tools.noModsForFilter: No mods found for this search/filter.
tools.hardwareLibraryDisconnectedMessage: Reconnect your Switch or remount the SD card to view and manage mods.
tools.hardwareLibraryCacheMessage: Reconnect your Switch or remount the SD card to refresh names, statuses, and details.
tools.selectMod: Select a mod to view details

modInfo.name: Name
modInfo.selectedHint: Ctrl/Cmd+click adds or removes mods, Shift+click selects a range. Press Delete to uninstall the selection.

plugins.pathNotConfiguredDesc: Please configure the plugins folder path in Settings to manage your plugins. This is required to install and update plugins.

settings.title: App Settings
settings.feedbackMessagePlaceholder: Describe the bug, feature, or feedback...
settings.feedbackHint: Sends app context with your report so issues are easier to reproduce.
settings.developerModeHint: Enable advanced developer features and debug tools
settings.showModHashsHint: Show the mod's hash below its name.
settings.fakeVersionHint: Override the current app version to test the update system. LEAVE EMPTY to use real version.
settings.devSettingsSaved: Developer settings saved. Please restart the app for version override to take effect.
settings.forceUpdateAvailableHint: Force the updater to report an update is available, even if you are on the latest version.
settings.animationsHint: Control the amount of animations in the interface
settings.enableStartupSplash: Play the splash screen on normal app startup
settings.startupSplashHint: Shows the startup splash before the app becomes interactive. When disabled, only the loading animation is shown.
settings.startupSplashSoundHint: Keeps the splash visual but mutes the startup audio.
settings.customStartupSplashSoundHint: Choose an MP3, WAV, OGG, or M4A file to play when FightPlanner starts.
settings.enablePrideTabIcons: Color the active tab icon with the selected FightPlanner logo
settings.prideTabIconsHint: When disabled, active tab icons stay in their normal white style.
settings.appSoundsHint: Choose custom audio files for FightPlanner interface events.
settings.appRunModeHint: Choose whether FightPlanner should monitor a real Switch connection or run in emulator mode.
settings.hardwareLibraryModeLocal: Keep mods on this PC and sync
settings.hardwareLibraryModeDirect: Read mods directly from the Switch
settings.hardwareLibraryModeHint: Sync mode keeps your FightPlanner library on this PC. Direct mode uses the mounted Switch SD card as the library.
settings.openTutorialDesc: Run setup first, then show the in-app guide
settings.openTutorialModsDesc: Switch to the mods tab and show the guide
settings.tutorialHint: Opens the setup tutorial window. The in-app guide appears after it closes.
settings.installConfirmHint: Display a modal to confirm mod downloads from browser links
settings.modsFolderHint: Select your Ultimate mods folder, usually sd:/ultimate/mods
settings.pluginsFolderHint: Select the folder containing your .nro plugin files
settings.autoDisableModsHint: When enabled, newly installed mods will be automatically disabled to prevent conflicts
settings.disableAllModsOnDownloadHint: When enabled, all active mods will be automatically disabled when a mod download starts
settings.bulkEnableModsDesc: Move all disabled mods back to the active folder
settings.bulkDisableModsDesc: Move all active mods into the disabled folder
settings.bulkModActionsHint: Quickly enable or disable your whole mod library in one click.
settings.exportModListDesc: Export all enabled mods to a text file, grouped by character
settings.exportModListHint: Creates a text file listing all enabled mods, organized by character, making it easy to share your mod list
settings.emulatorTypeHint: Select which emulator you want to use
settings.resetStoreHint: This will reset all application settings and data stored in Electron Store. The application will restart after reset.
settings.resetStoreDesc: Clear all stored settings and data
settings.resetStoreConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all application data? This action cannot be undone.
settings.libraryPathFixIntro: FightPlanner cannot use one or more saved folders on this system. Choose the correct folder here and the app will save it immediately.
settings.pathIssueMissing: This folder does not exist or cannot be accessed.
settings.pathIssueWrongModsFolder: The mods folder must point to ultimate/mods.
settings.modsPathFixHint: Select the folder that contains your Ultimate mods, usually sd:/ultimate/mods.
settings.pluginsPathFixHint: Select the folder that contains your .nro plugin files.
settings.selectReplacementPathRequired: Please select a corrected folder for each listed path.
settings.exportConfigBackupDesc: Save settings, stage layout, Character CSS layout, presets, and custom CSS/JS files
settings.restoreConfigBackupDesc: Replace the current configuration from a FightPlanner backup file
settings.configBackupHint: Restoring a backup locks the app until FightPlanner is restarted so every setting is loaded cleanly.
settings.restoreConfigBackupConfirmMessage: Restore this backup? Your current FightPlanner settings, stage layout, Character CSS layout, presets, and referenced custom CSS/JS files will be replaced. FightPlanner must restart afterward.
settings.restartRequiredAfterRestore: Your configuration was restored. FightPlanner is locked until restart so the restored settings, stages, and CSS data load cleanly.
settings.emulatorPathHint: Select your emulator executable or app (for example yuzu.exe, Ryujinx.exe, AppImage, or .app)
settings.launchFullscreenHint: When enabled, adds the -f flag to launch the emulator in fullscreen mode
settings.batchTestingDesc: Use a guided binary test to isolate whether a mod or plugin is causing the problem.
settings.batchTestingReadyDesc: Choose where to begin, then FightPlanner will disable groups step by step until the likely cause is isolated.
settings.batchTestingStartModsDesc: Recommended first. Most problems come from mods.
settings.batchTestingStartPluginsDesc: Useful if the issue looks related to Skyline or a runtime plugin.
settings.batchTestingButtonDesc: Disable groups step by step to isolate the cause
settings.batchTestingCancelButtonDesc: Cancel the current session and restore the original state
settings.batchTestingHowStepOneDesc: A portion of your active mods or plugins is turned off temporarily.
settings.batchTestingHowStepTwoDesc: Launch the game, reproduce the issue, then tell FightPlanner if it works now.
settings.batchTestingHowStepThreeDesc: FightPlanner repeats the process until the most likely cause is isolated.
settings.batchTestingRunningDesc: FightPlanner is narrowing the suspect pool. You can leave this screen and resume at any time.
settings.batchTestingWaitingDesc: {{count}} items are disabled for this check. Launch the game, test the issue, then answer.
settings.batchTestingFoundTitle: A likely cause is ready to review
settings.batchTestingFoundDesc: FightPlanner isolated {{culprit}}. Reopen the session to choose what to do next.
settings.batchTestingViewResultButtonDesc: Review the likely culprit and choose the next action.
settings.batchTestingResumeCurrentStepDesc: Continue the current test and answer if the game works now.
settings.batchTestingPrimaryCause: The current priority is shown as the principal cause while testing.
settings.batchTestingLaunchGame: Launch the game and confirm if it works
settings.batchTestingEmulatorReady: Your emulator is configured. A launch button will be available during each test step.
settings.batchTestingChecklistLaunchDesc: Open the game with this temporary setup.
settings.batchTestingChecklistCheckDesc: See if the bug, crash, or problem still happens.
settings.batchTestingChecklistAnswerDesc: Use the buttons below to say if the game works now or not.
settings.batchTestingDeleteOrDisable: Do you want to delete it or just disable it?
settings.batchTestingNoCauseDesc: No clear primary cause was isolated in the active mods or plugins. The original state has been restored.
settings.batchTestingNoCauseTipOneDesc: If you started with mods, try plugins first next time, or the opposite.
settings.batchTestingNoCauseTipTwoDesc: If you install or remove items later, you can run the diagnostic again.
settings.batchTestingPrompt: These items are currently disabled. Launch the game, test the issue, then tell FightPlanner whether it works now.
settings.batchTestingGroupDesc: The issue stopped only when this whole group was disabled together.
settings.transferMethodHint: Choose how to send mods to Switch: via FTP, MTP / USB, or directly to SD card
settings.driveLetterHint: Select the drive letter of your Switch SD card (e.g., E:)
settings.switchDriveGuideButton: Guide me to connect my Switch
settings.switchDriveGuideHekateDesc: Use Hekate USB tools to mount the SD card on this computer.
settings.switchDriveGuideHomebrewDesc: Longer setup. This flow is not available yet.
settings.switchDriveGuideHomebrewPending: The homebrew guide is not available yet.
settings.switchDriveGuidePlaying: Follow the animation. Next unlocks when it finishes.
settings.switchDriveGuideReady: Ready. Connect the SD card, then continue.
settings.switchDriveGuideMultipleDrives: Multiple drives found. Select your Switch SD card.
settings.switchDriveGuideNoDrive: No drive detected. Connect the SD card and try again.
settings.switchDriveGuideUnavailable: Switch connection guide is not available.
settings.switchUsbDevicePickerHint: Choose the Switch USB volume mounted by Hekate.
settings.switchUsbDeviceNone: No USB device detected. Check the cable, mount the SD card in Hekate, then refresh.
settings.switchSyncReconnectMessage: You were reading mods directly from the Switch. To sync those mods back to this PC, reconnect your Switch or remount the SD card first.
settings.switchSyncReconnectHint: Once the card is available, refresh the Mods tab so FightPlanner can read the current Switch library before continuing.
settings.switchIpPort: Switch IP address and FTP port (default: 5000)
settings.switchFtpCredentials: Optional FTP username and password (defaults to ftp / ftp)
settings.switchFtpPath: Remote mods folder on the Switch SD card
settings.switchFtpPluginsPath: Remote plugins folder on the Switch SD card
settings.conflictDetectionHint: Automatically check for file conflicts between mods
settings.enableNroLimitCheck: Warn when active mods exceed 64 .nro files
settings.nroLimitCheckHint: Checks active mods for the 64 .nro file limit in emulator and real hardware modes.
settings.enableLibraryPathValidation: Warn when saved mods/plugins paths are missing or invalid
settings.libraryPathValidationHint: When enabled, FightPlanner asks you to fix broken library paths after moving between systems.
settings.ignoredConflictHint: File paths added here will be ignored during conflict detection.
settings.ignoredConflictEmpty: No ignored conflicts yet. Add a file path to hide it from checks.
settings.enablePluginAutoUpdate: Check for plugin updates on startup
settings.pluginAutoUpdateHint: Automatically check for plugin updates when the application starts
settings.clearTempFilesDesc: Remove temporary download and extraction files
settings.clearTempFilesHint: Clears temporary files left from mod downloads and installations. Safe to use at any time.
settings.customCssHint: Load custom CSS files to modify the appearance of FightPlanner
settings.customCssInfo: Custom CSS files will be applied in order, on top of the default styles
settings.customJsHint: Load custom JavaScript files to extend FightPlanner functionality
settings.customJsWarning: Warning: Only load JavaScript from trusted sources. Malicious code can harm your system.
settings.securityNoticeText: Custom CSS and JavaScript files have full access to the application. Only use files from developers you trust.
settings.securityNoticeList1: CSS can modify the visual appearance and layout
settings.securityNoticeList2: JavaScript can access all application features and data
settings.securityNoticeList3: Changes take effect after reloading or restarting the app
settings.openLogsFolderDesc: View all saved log files on disk
settings.logsHint: Logs are automatically saved daily. Both main process and renderer logs are captured.
settings.logRetentionHint: Logs older than this number of days will be automatically deleted on startup
settings.logsEmpty: No logs yet. Console output will appear here.
settings.logsInfo: Showing logs from current session. Use "Open Logs Folder" above to view historical logs.
settings.languageHint: Select your preferred language for the application
settings.pathWarningText: This may not be the right mods folder:
settings.incorrectPathWarning: Using a different folder may prevent ARCropolis from detecting your mods correctly.
settings.checkForUpdatesDesc: Manually check if a new version is available
settings.updatesHint: FightPlanner automatically checks for public beta updates on startup.
settings.enableAppAutoUpdate: Check for app updates on startup
settings.enhancedStatusBarHint: Display detailed information cards in status bar (downloads, conflicts, etc.)
settings.enableAnalytics: Send anonymous usage data to help improve FightPlanner
settings.analyticsHint: When enabled, anonymous crash reports and usage statistics are sent to help us improve the application. No personal data is collected. You can disable this at any time.
settings.devWarningText: Modifying these settings can cause unexpected behavior, break your application, or corrupt your data. Only change these options if you know what you are doing. These settings are intended for development and testing purposes only.
settings.posthogTestsHint: Send test events to PostHog to verify analytics integration is working correctly.
settings.sendTestErrorDesc: Send a test error to PostHog
settings.toastTestsHint: Test toast notifications and stacking animations.
settings.spamToastsDesc: Send 5 toasts rapidly to test stacking
settings.seeConfigJsonDesc: Open the configuration file in your default editor

nroLimit.message: {{count}} active .nro files detected. The limit is {{limit}} in emulator and real hardware modes. Disable or remove {{overflow}} .nro file(s).

editInfo.title: Edit Info.toml
editInfo.previewHint: PNG, JPG, GIF and other image files are converted to preview.webp automatically.

uninstall.warning: Are you sure you want to uninstall
uninstall.hint: This will permanently delete the mod folder and cannot be undone.
uninstall.warningMultiple: Are you sure you want to uninstall these {{count}} mods?
uninstall.hintMultiple: This will permanently delete the selected mod folders and cannot be undone.

deletePlugin.title: Delete Plugin
deletePlugin.warning: Are you sure you want to delete
deletePlugin.hint: This action cannot be undone. The plugin file will be permanently removed.

conflictSlot.hint: Select a mod to change its slot:

pluginIntro.title: Automatic Plugin Updates
pluginIntro.message: To benefit from automatic updates, plugins must be installed or reinstalled via the Marketplace. Would you like to enable automatic checks and open the Marketplace now?

advancedInfo.placeholder: Edit the raw TOML file content here...

installConfirm.question: Do you want to download and install this mod?
installConfirm.hint: The mod will be downloaded and automatically installed to your mods folder.

update.restartHint: Click "Install and Restart" to apply the update.

customization.understandRisks: I understand the risks and trust this JavaScript file

downloads.noDownloadsHint: Mods installed via GameBanana links will appear here

characters.title: Characters
characters.configureModsFolder: Configure your mods folder in Settings to see characters with mods.
characters.cssSourceRequiredMessage: Choose your own Character CSS source files before editing.
characters.cssSourceInspectorHint: Select PRC, layout PRC and MSBT to edit CSS.
characters.changeCssSourceConfirm: Replace the current Character CSS source files? Unsaved layout changes will be lost.

stages.title: Stages
stages.subtitle: Reorder the stage grid, right-click a stage to hide it, then save to regenerate the Stage Layout.
stages.sourceRequiredMessage: Choose your own ui_stage_db.xml before editing the stage layout.
stages.instructions: Drag any visible stage after the Random cells, or right-click a stage to hide it. Use the hidden stages button to restore it.
stages.noteOverflow: Current embedded stage data needs {{rows}} rows to display every stage.
stages.hiddenModalHint: Use the restore button under a hidden stage to show it again.
stages.presetChooserHint: Load a saved stage layout preset, start a fresh one, or save your current arrangement.
stages.presetEmpty: No saved stage layout presets yet.
stages.presetNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this layout

tutorialGuide.a_quick_tour_will_show_what_each_main_pa: A quick tour will show what each main part of the app does.
tutorialGuide.pick_the_language_you_want_to_use_in_fig: Pick the language you want to use in FightPlanner.
tutorialGuide.use_this_bar_to_move_between_mods_plugin: Use this bar to move between mods, plugins, characters, stages, downloads, settings, and credits.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_it_opens_the_main_workspa: Click this tab. It opens the main workspace for enabling, disabling, searching, renaming, slot changes, and uninstalling mods.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_mods_workspace_use_it_to_ena: This is the Mods workspace. Use it to enable, disable, search, rename, change slots, and uninstall mods.
tutorialGuide.use_this_top_bar_to_search_mods_refresh_: Use this top bar to search mods, refresh the list, run Smart Rename, switch profiles, sort, and filter by category.
tutorialGuide.installed_mods_appear_here_select_a_mod_: Installed mods appear here. Select a mod to see its preview and details. Right-click a mod for actions like rename, slot change, folder open, or uninstall.
tutorialGuide.the_right_panel_shows_selected_mod_detai: The right panel shows selected mod details. Bottom buttons add a mod, create an FPP pack, open the mods folder, or launch the emulator.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_plugins_are_managed_separ: Click this tab. Plugins are managed separately from normal mods, including Skyline plugin files and plugin updates.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_plugins_tab_use_it_for_skyli: This is the Plugins tab. Use it for Skyline plugin files, plugin updates, and plugin-specific management.
tutorialGuide.use_these_controls_to_search_plugins_add: Use these controls to search plugins, add a plugin file, refresh, open the plugin folder, check updates, or open the plugin marketplace.
tutorialGuide.your_installed_plugins_appear_here_this_: Your installed plugins appear here. This area is separate from mods so plugin updates and plugin actions stay clean.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_it_groups_content_by_figh: Click this tab. It groups content by fighter so you can inspect character mods without digging through folders.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_characters_tab_it_groups_ins: This is the Characters tab. It groups installed content by fighter so character mods are easier to inspect.
tutorialGuide.search_fighters_refresh_the_character_vi: Search fighters, refresh the character view, open moveset mods, or edit the character CSS layout from this toolbar.
tutorialGuide.fighters_are_shown_here_select_a_charact: Fighters are shown here. Select a character to inspect related mods and quickly understand what content is installed for that fighter.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_it_helps_you_inspect_stag: Click this tab. It helps you inspect stage slots and stage-related content.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_stages_tab_use_it_to_inspect: This is the Stages tab. Use it to inspect stage slots and stage-related content.
tutorialGuide.use_this_header_to_choose_a_layout_prese: Use this header to choose a layout preset, show hidden stages when available, and apply the stage layout after changes.
tutorialGuide.this_grid_is_the_stage_layout_editor_dra: This grid is the stage layout editor. Drag stage cells after the Random cells, then apply the layout to save the order.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_gamebanana_installs_and_t: Click this tab. GameBanana installs and transfers show up here so you can track progress and send mods to your Switch.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_downloads_tab_gamebanana_ins: This is the Downloads tab. GameBanana installs and transfer progress appear here.
tutorialGuide.the_header_shows_download_count_and_give: The header shows download count and gives you cleanup controls, like clearing completed downloads.
tutorialGuide.active_downloads_show_current_progress_c: Active downloads show current progress. Completed downloads show finished installs and transfer history.
tutorialGuide.click_this_tab_configure_language_run_mo: Click this tab. Configure language, run mode, emulator or Switch paths, interface options, logs, and developer tools here.
tutorialGuide.this_is_the_settings_tab_configure_langu: This is the Settings tab. Configure language, run mode, paths, interface options, logs, and developer tools here.
tutorialGuide.this_sidebar_splits_settings_into_app_in: This sidebar splits settings into App, Interface, Audio, Updates, Library, Emulator, Switch, Logs, and Developer options.
tutorialGuide.each_section_opens_its_own_controls_on_t: Each section opens its own controls on the right. Use Settings when you need paths, visual options, diagnostics, logs, or developer tools.
tutorialGuide.the_bottom_bar_shows_app_state_and_quick: The bottom bar shows app state and quick status information while you work.
tutorialGuide.how_do_you_want_to_learn_mod_installatio: How do you want to learn mod installation?
tutorialGuide.this_modal_confirms_the_mod_download_cli: This modal confirms the mod download. Click Download & Install to start the install.
tutorialGuide.open_a_gamebanana_mod_in_your_browser_th: Open a GameBanana mod in your browser, then click a fightplanner: 1-click install link. FightPlanner will wait here until the install modal appears.
tutorialGuide.after_confirming_watch_this_bar_and_the_: After confirming, watch this bar and the Downloads tab for download, extraction, install, and transfer status.
tutorialGuide.you_know_the_main_tabs_and_the_install_f: You know the main tabs and the install flow now. Enjoy FightPlanner.
